TheSettledPrinceofDonghai[東海定王] was[Cao] Lin. In the third year of theera [222], he was installed asPrinceofHedong[河東王]. In the sixth year [225], he changed fief toGuantao county[館陶縣]. After theBrightEmperorascended the throne, because of the dying intentions of theformer emperor, he adored and favored[Cao] Linuniquely from the other fiefdoms. However,[Cao] Linwas coarse and violent by nature, and within his boudoirs, many of his maids and concubines were injured and killed. In the sixth year of theera [232], he changed fief toDonghai[東海]. In the first year of theera [249], he died. His son,[Cao] Qi, succeeded him. During the,, anderas, the fief gradually increased, joining with the previous for a total of six thousand and two hundred households. TheTownship DukeofGaogui[高貴鄉公],[Cao] Mao, was the son ofCao Lin, and he entered [the capital] to succeed in the main lineage of the clan.
